PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, XIAO G. GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR YU, JI BO SHEN, XIAN SHEN, LAN WU, FRANK A MINOR THRU HIS GUARDIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHER, ALEKSANDROVICH ILYA $1,158.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,158.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT THE FOLLOWING PLAINTIFFS TO RECOVER AS FOLLOWS: 1. XIAO WU- $563.00. 2. LAM SHEN- $420.00. 3. FRANK WU [A MINOR]- $175.00. 4. XIAN SHEN- $0. 5. JI BO YU- $0.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-06-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-06-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), IF NO PROOF OF SERVICE, PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE AN ORDER TO PUBLISH.
